1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x="0px" xml:space="preserve" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="#e8eaed" height="24px" viewbox="0 -960 960 960" width="24px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M784-120 532-372q-30 24-69 38t-83 14q-109 0-184.5-75.5T120-580q0-109 75.5-184.5T380-
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative

SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="#e8eaed" height="24px" viewbox="0 -960 960 960" width="24px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M784-120 532-372q-30 24-69 38t-83 14q-109 0-184.5-75.5T120-580q0-109 75.5-184.5T380-

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

List contains non-li elements: ['div', 'div']

<ul id="manual-list-wrap-ul"> <li class="archive-element"> <a aria-hidden="true" href="/nb-NO/fellesrad/odal-fellesrad/aktuelt/jule%C3%A5pningstider/" tabindex="-1"> <div class="overlay"></div> <pictu
List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h2></h2>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed

Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (5 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Myldregudstjeneste</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

List contains non-li elements: ['div', 'div']

<ul id="manual-list-wrap-ul"> <li class="archive-element"> <a aria-hidden="true" href="/nb-NO/fellesrad/odal-fellesrad/aktuelt/jule%C3%A5pningstider/" tabindex="-1"> <div class="overlay"></div> <pictu
List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children

MODERATE

Link text is a URL

Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input class="search2024__input" disabled="" id="linkToCopy" style="flex: 1" type="text" value="https://www.kirken.no/nb-NO/fellesrad/odal-fellesrad/hva-skjer/"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__show-details" id="coiShowDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__hide-details" id="coiHideDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Skjul detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator active" id="coiDeclarationIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Cookie-erklæring</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator" id="coiAboutIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Om cookies</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

<a class="menu__link" href="/nb-NO/fellesrad/odal-fellesrad/konfirmasjon/?amp;amp;epslanguage=nb-NO"> Konfirmant</a>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

SERIOUS

Element has empty aria-label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Provide descriptive text in aria-label or remove if not needed

Dåp - Odal kirkelige fellesråd

https://www.kirken.no/nb-NO/fellesrad/odal-fellesrad/dap/?amp;amp;epslanguage=nb-NO
Avvik: 215 | Bestått: 115
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x="0px" xml:space="preserve" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="#e8eaed" height="24px" viewbox="0 -960 960 960" width="24px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M784-120 532-372q-30 24-69 38t-83 14q-109 0-184.5-75.5T120-580q0-109 75.5-184.5T380-
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="#e8eaed" height="24px" viewbox="0 -960 960 960" width="24px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M784-120 532-372q-30 24-69 38t-83 14q-109 0-184.5-75.5T120-580q0-109 75.5-184.5T380-
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

2.1.1 Tastatur (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__show-details" id="coiShowDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__hide-details" id="coiHideDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Skjul detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator active" id="coiDeclarationIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Cookie-erklæring</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator" id="coiAboutIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Om cookies</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input class="search2024__input" disabled="" id="linkToCopy" style="flex: 1" type="text" value="https://www.kirken.no/nb-NO/fellesrad/odal-fellesrad/menighet/"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__show-details" id="coiShowDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__hide-details" id="coiHideDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Skjul detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator active" id="coiDeclarationIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Cookie-erklæring</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator" id="coiAboutIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Om cookies</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

SERIOUS

Element has empty aria-label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Provide descriptive text in aria-label or remove if not needed

Hva skjer? - Odal kirkelige fellesråd

https://www.kirken.no/nb-NO/fellesrad/odal-fellesrad/hva-skjer/activity?id=acbfef3a-7c26-45b1-b068-61f1cd436e17

Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

Form input has no label

Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__show-details" id="coiShowDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__hide-details" id="coiHideDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Skjul detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator active" id="coiDeclarationIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Cookie-erklæring</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator" id="coiAboutIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Om cookies</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

MODERATE

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input class="search2024__input" disabled="" id="linkToCopy" style="flex: 1" type="text" value="https://www.kirken.no/nb-NO/fellesrad/odal-fellesrad/virksomhetsomrader/pamelding-konfirmanter-2018/"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__show-details" id="coiShowDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__hide-details" id="coiHideDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Skjul detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator active" id="coiDeclarationIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Cookie-erklæring</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator" id="coiAboutIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Om cookies</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

SVG is missing accessible name

MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1

MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

Element has empty aria-label

Provide descriptive text in aria-label or remove if not needed

Odal kirkelige fellesråd - Odal kirkelige fellesråd

https://www.kirken.no/nb-NO/fellesrad/odal-fellesrad/
Avvik: 225 | Bestått: 143

Start your heading structure with h1

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>

MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

<svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x="0px" xml:space="preserve" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="#e8eaed" height="24px" viewbox="0 -960 960 960" width="24px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M784-120 532-372q-30 24-69 38t-83 14q-109 0-184.5-75.5T120-580q0-109 75.5-184.5T380-
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="#e8eaed" height="24px" viewbox="0 -960 960 960" width="24px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M784-120 532-372q-30 24-69 38t-83 14q-109 0-184.5-75.5T120-580q0-109 75.5-184.5T380-
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (179 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text is a URL

<a href="https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement" target="_blank">https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement</a>
Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement" target="_blank">https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

Link text is very long (176 characters)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/nb-NO/church-of-norway/Ceremonies/baptism/" tabindex="-1"> <picture><source sizes="(max-width: 820px) 100vw, 400px" srcset="/globalassets/%20nasjonale%20bilder%20og%20blok
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Read more'

<a href="/nb-NO/church-of-norway/Ceremonies/baptism/" title="Les mer om Baptism in Church of Norway">Read more<i aria-hidden="true" class="dnk-icon angle-right-icon"></i></a>

2.1.1 Tastatur (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__show-details" id="coiShowDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__hide-details" id="coiHideDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Skjul detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator active" id="coiDeclarationIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Cookie-erklæring</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator" id="coiAboutIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Om cookies</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<input class="search-box" id="search-box-mobile" name="q" placeholder="" required="" type="search" value=""/>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button role="button" title="Søk">Søk</button>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

Recurring Issues in Article/News Pages (3 pages scanned)

[ARTICLE PAGES SUMMARY - 3 pages]
Avvik: 40 | Bestått: 0
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1 (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name (×13 across article pages)

<svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x="0px" xml:space="preserve" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative

First heading is h2, should start with h1 (×3 across article pages)

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1

MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label (×3 across article pages)

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

List contains non-li elements: ['div', 'div'] (×1 across article pages)

List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4 (×1 across article pages)

<h4 title="Lenker tilhørende artikkel">Lenker</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4

CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible (×12 across article pages)

<a class="summary-texts__show-details" id="coiShowDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order (×3 across article pages)

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

Testreglene er basert på UU-tilsynets offisielle testregler

🔄 Start ny skanning

https://www.kirken.no/odal
1-500

Kopier kommandoen:

python checker.py https://www.kirken.no/odal --max-pages 14 --format html
